object_a.label: picture frame
object_a.description: Square white-framed coastal scene higher on wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: Light-colored (white) frame containing a small, colorful coastal or beach illustration. Mounted on the sloping stair wall above and slightly right of the central framed sailboat print.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Above and slightly right of the central black-framed picture and left of the top-right frame

object_b.label: ceiling light
object_b.long_form_open_description: Several pendant or recessed lights illuminate the kitchen island and counter area; small points of warm light visible under the upper cabinetry and over the island indicating task lighting.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Positioned above the kitchen island and countertop area in the background
